title: Amethyst Golem Refreshed
description: Amethyst Golem is a Natural Spawning Golem that Spawn in Amethyst Geodes. Amethyst Golem is a Hostile Mob with its Deadly Attacks it can destroy a full Netherite Armor Player so be careful while Fighting it...
body: + ### **Amethyst Golem...** Amethyst Golem is a Natural Spawning Golem that Spawn in Amethyst Geodes(depending on how the geode is shaped it). Amethyst Golem is a Hostile Mob with its Deadly Attacks it can destroy a full Armored Player so be careful while Fighting it...... + ### Attacks..... Amethyst Golem has 2 Kinds of attack the Direct Attack when it swings its arm and does ALOT of Damage and its Magic Attack which allows it to summon Amethyst Clusters Under the player which deals a Good Amount of Damage too..... + ### Drops and Items After Killing the Amethyst Golem it will drop an Amethyst Golem Sherd Which can be Combined with a Trident by Ground Crafting to Create a New Weapon known as the Amethyst Wand which allows the player to summon Amethyst Clusters Under Mobs aimed at(player require amethyst shards to use the wand). + ### Commands spawn command: `animated_java:amgolem/summon` give wand command: `animated_java:amgolem/mech/amwand_give` + ### Credit Model By Jeekoo200: www.planetminecraft.com/member/jeekoo200/ Animations By PSYCHOPATH and Eyalego: sketchfab.com/Eyalego The Render Image By GCGames Studio: https://www.youtube.com/c/GCGamesStudios + Support me on Kofi!
